vllm.title: Add documentation to Triton server tutorial
vllm.author: tanmayv25
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There has been a growing interest in how to deploy vLLM within Triton. Adding this documentation would make it easier for vLLM to find Triton as a serving platform. #541 (comment)

vllm.title: rope_theta and max_position_embeddings from config
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR lets rope_theta and max_position_embeddings to be read from model configs instead of hardcoding them. Notably, this allows codellama to work without issues with longer contexts.
Fixes #904
